texto: We come into this world priceless, with no value befitting our precious tiny frame. As we grow older we begin to assign value to ourselves. And eventually we reach a point where we can place a monetary value on our existence. It is in this moment where we stop believing we are priceless that we start believing we are worthless.

texto: Books most certainly don't write themselves, but life does. When in doubt about what to write, use your own life.
